title: Doff Slug & Snail Killer - 800g Slug Pellets for Garden - Ferric Phosphate Slug and Snail Pellets - Long Lasting Pest Control in Damp Conditions for Up to 14 Days - Crop Friendly
features: RELIABLE SLUG PROTECTION – Keep your garden free from slugs with Doff Slug & Snail Killer pellets. These ready-to-use slug pellets stay effective for up to 14 days, even in wet weather, offering lasting protection for fruits, vegetables and flowers

EFFECTIVE DAMAGE CONTROL –Scatter pellets evenly onto moist bare soil around the young plants to create a durable barrier against slimy slugs and snails. Best applied in the evening or early morning, especially in damp conditions when slugs are most active. These blue slug pellets ensure reliable protection against pest damage

DEFEND & NOURISH – These ferric phosphate pellets effectively eradicate slugs to help keep your garden protected and flourishing. It can be applied around edible crops and ornamental plants up to the day of harvest. Suitable for organic gardening

CLEAN & COMPREHENSIVE – The advanced formula targets adult slugs and snails, offering complete slug & snail control without leaving a slimy residue. Suitable for large and small gardens, these pellets are available in 800g and 400g sizes, keeping your area clean and pest-free year-round

KEEP ON GROWING – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering safe and effective pest control to help your garden grow
description: From the manufacturer Showerproof Formulation Reduced Damage To Crops & Flowers Leaves No Excessive Slime
